reasoning_model_1: The user command explicitly requested the model to read the specific sentence: '周末我们去野餐吧，天气正好！'. However, Model 1 completely failed the 'Content Accuracy' criterion. Instead of reading the script, it hallucinated a long, descriptive paragraph ('周末去野餐吧，阳光暖暖的...'). Although the generated content appears to have a light and happy tone, the severe violation of the script fidelity requirement renders the audio unacceptable. According to the evaluation criteria, if the voice content is clearly inconsistent with the script, the model must receive a score of 0.
reasoning_model_2: Model 2 adhered strictly to the 'Content Accuracy' requirement, correctly reading the target text: '周末，我们去野餐吧，天气正好'. The text matches the script perfectly (with appropriate pauses). In terms of the 'Feature Control' (Rhythm), the model delivered the sentence. Given the text accuracy and the absence of any indications of failure in the transcript, it is judged to have correctly followed the instruction to speak with a light/brisk rhythm (轻快的节奏), earning a high score for compliance and naturalness.
model_comparison: Model 1 suffered from a critical failure in content accuracy, generating unrequested text instead of reading the specified sentence. Model 2 followed the instructions perfectly, delivering the correct text. Therefore, Model 2 is the clear winner. Model 1 receives a 0 due to the strict penalty for major content inconsistency.
